product.name: Agency Client Communication Intelligence Tool
product.tagline: Stop losing clients to silence. Know who's at risk before they churn.
product.description: A zero-dependency Python CLI tool that analyzes client communication patterns — touchpoint frequency, response times, sentiment scores, channel diversity — and generates a prioritized action plan with an interactive HTML dashboard. Identifies at-risk clients, recommends optimal engagement cadences per tier, and surfaces upsell-ready accounts.
features: Multi-dimensional risk scoring (touches, gaps, response time, sentiment, channels)
4-tier client segmentation with configurable cadence targets
5 risk levels with color-coded prioritization (Critical → Healthy)
Interactive HTML dashboard with radial risk gauges
Built-in sample data generator for prototyping
deliverables: sample_clients.csv (12 sample accounts across all tiers)

industry: AI Automation Agencies / Agency Operations / Client Retention
